Something is Cooking

Hi! I'm Gou!

Gou is the chinese word for Dog!

GOU IS... NEIRO’S SON!(And doge’s Nephew)

"I wish I could have met my uncle, Doge..."

How To Buy

1
Download a Crypto Wallet

Install a trusted wallet like MetaMask or Trust Wallet on your device.

2
Add Ethereum (ETH)

Purchase Ethereum on an exchange (e.g., Binance, Coinbase) and transfer it to your wallet.

3
Go to Uniswap

Connect your wallet to Uniswap and search for $Gou using the provided contract address.

4
Swap ETH for $Gou

Trade your Ethereum for $Gou tokens, and you’re all set! Welcome to the Gou Gang!

DO YOU DREAM?My mom tells me to dream big because anything is possible.My dream is to BE one day just like my uncle Doge, and my mom Niero, spreading joy across the world!
